review.title: Spaced repetition
review.subtitle: Spaced repetition system based on the SM-2 algorithm
review.howItWorksDescription: The SM-2 system calculates the best time to review each concept. The more you succeed, the longer the interval.
review.rateRecall: How well did you recall this?

howItWorksSteps.step1: 1. Complete capsules to add them to your reviews
howItWorksSteps.step2: 2. The SM-2 algorithm calculates the optimal time to review
howItWorksSteps.step3: 3. Rate your recall from 0 (no memory) to 5 (perfect)
howItWorksSteps.step4: 4. Intervals adapt: the more you retain, the less you review

purpose.title: Purpose of the Service
purpose.content: GENIA Web Training is an online training platform dedicated to Prompt Engineering. It offers training modules, a pedagogical AI assistant, and a certification system. These terms govern the use of the platform.

access.title: Access Conditions
access.content: Access to the platform requires creating a free personal account. Each user is responsible for keeping their login credentials confidential. The account is strictly personal and cannot be transferred or shared.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All platform content (courses, exercises, GENIA pedagogical method, source code) is protected by intellectual property law. The source code is distributed under the BSL 1.1 license. Any unauthorized reproduction or reuse is prohibited.

personalData.title: Personal Data
personalData.content: The collection and processing of personal data is detailed in our Privacy Policy accessible at /privacy. By using the platform, you agree to the processing of your data in accordance with this policy.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: GENIA Web Training strives to ensure the availability and quality of the platform. However, the platform is provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind. GENIA Web Training shall not be held liable for any direct or indirect damages related to the use of the platform.

modifications.title: Modifications to the Terms
modifications.content: GENIA Web Training reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be informed of changes by email or through the platform. Continued use of the platform after modification constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For any questions regarding these terms, you can contact us at support@geniawebtraining.com or through our contact page.

applicableLaw.title: Applicable Law
applicableLaw.content: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute related to the interpretation or execution of these terms shall be submitted to the competent courts of Paris, France.

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.content: We collect the following data: email address, full name, username, module progress, exercise scores and assessments, language and theme preferences. This data is necessary for the platform to function and to personalize your learning experience.

dataUsage.title: Data Usage
dataUsage.content: Your data is used to: personalize your learning path and adapt difficulty levels, track your progress and generate your certificates, improve the platform through usage analytics, and send you training-related notifications (review reminders, new content).

storage.title: Data Storage
storage.content: Your data is securely stored on Supabase servers hosted in the European Union. Communications are encrypted in transit (TLS) and sensitive data is encrypted at rest. Access to data is strictly limited to authorized personnel.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: The platform uses only functional cookies necessary for its operation (authentication session, language and theme preferences). We do not use third-party tracking cookies or advertising cookies.

userRights.title: Your Rights (GDPR)
userRights.content: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights: right of access to your data, right of rectification, right to erasure ('right to be forgotten'), right to data portability, right to object to processing. To exercise these rights, contact us at support@geniawebtraining.com.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Your personal data is retained for the duration of your registration on the platform. If you delete your account, your data will be deleted within 30 days, except for data required to comply with our legal obligations.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.content: We use the following third-party services: Supabase for database and authentication, Vercel for platform hosting, Sentry for error monitoring, and Resend for transactional emails. Each of these providers is committed to respecting the confidentiality of your data.

dpo.title: DPO Contact
dpo.content: For any questions regarding the protection of your personal data, you can contact our Data Protection Officer at support@geniawebtraining.com.

presentation.title: Our Mission
presentation.content: GENIA Web Training is a Prompt Engineering training platform with an adaptive AI assistant. Our mission is to train students and professionals in Prompt Engineering through an innovative AI-assisted pedagogical method. The platform offers structured training modules, a personal AI assistant, and a gamification system to make learning engaging and effective.

method.title: The GENIA Method
method.subtitle: A unique pedagogical approach with 5 pillars

pillars.G: Structured, step-by-step progressive learning for optimal concept understanding.
pillars.E: Concrete examples drawn from real professional situations for immediate application.
pillars.N: The system automatically adapts to your level and learning speed.
pillars.I: Immediate hands-on practice with interactive exercises and stimulating challenges.
pillars.A: Real-time progress tracking with constructive and encouraging assessments.

technologies.title: Technologies Used
technologies.content: GENIA Web Training is built with cutting-edge technologies: Next.js 14 for the frontend, Supabase for database and authentication, and multi-provider AI integration (Mistral, OpenAI, Anthropic) for the pedagogical assistant. The platform is deployed on Vercel and available as a Progressive Web App (PWA).

creator.title: The Creator
creator.content: GENIA Web Training was designed and developed by Hemerson KOFFI, an AI pedagogy expert passionate about democratizing artificial intelligence. His goal: making Prompt Engineering accessible to everyone through an innovative pedagogical method and personalized AI guidance.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.description: Fill in the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.name: Name
form.subject: Subject
form.successMessage: Thank you for your message. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.

support.title: Help Center
support.subtitle: Quickly find answers to your questions.

resetPassword.question: How do I reset my password?
resetPassword.answer: On the login page, click 'Forgot password?'. Enter your email address and you'll receive a reset link by email. Check your spam folder if you don't receive the email.

howAiWorks.question: How does the GENIA AI work?
howAiWorks.answer: GENIA is a pedagogical assistant that uses artificial intelligence to adapt to your level. It applies the GENIA Method with 5 pillars (Guide, Examples, Adaptive Level, Interaction, Assessment) to personalize your learning path.

dataSecurity.question: Is my data secure?
dataSecurity.answer: Yes, data security is our top priority. We use Supabase with encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. We are GDPR compliant and we don't use third-party tracking cookies. Check our privacy policy for more details.

contactSupport.question: How do I contact support?
contactSupport.answer: You can contact us through the Contact page on our website, or directly by email at support@geniawebtraining.com. We typically respond within 48 hours.

needHelp.title: Need More Help?
needHelp.description: If you haven't found the answer to your question, don't hesitate to contact us directly.

step1.title: Welcome!
step1.message: Hi! I'm GENIA, your personal Prompt Engineering trainer! 🎉 Let me show you around the platform in 2 minutes. Ready?

step2.title: Your adaptive level
step2.message: Here you can see your level. I automatically adapt to you: beginner, intermediate, advanced or expert. The more you progress, the more I challenge you! 💪

step3.title: Spaced repetition
step3.message: This is your review space. Thanks to the SM-2 algorithm, I remind you of concepts at the perfect time to anchor them in your memory. Come back here every day! 🧠

step4.title: Chat with me
step4.message: When you have a question, come talk to me! I'm available 24/7 to explain concepts, give you exercises, and correct your prompts. Never hesitate! 💬

step5.title: Your course modules
step5.message: Here are your training modules! Start with Module 1 and progress at your own pace. Each capsule contains theory, examples and hands-on exercises. 📚

step6.title: You're ready! 🚀
step6.message: You're ready for the adventure! Remember: prompt engineering is like a muscle, the more you practice, the stronger you get. Shall we begin?
